summary: Analysed log excerpt to diagnose a log injection attack (CWE-117) where a newline character in the url field of request r-101 mimicked a standalone admin login log (r-102).
evidence: Detected explicit newline escape character (\n) nested inside the url field of r-101: https://normal-url.com\n{"ts":"2025-01-15T15:42:03.500Z",...}
Noticed timing anomaly: r-101 closed at 15:42:03.420Z, but the nested log claimed to run at 15:42:03.500Z (80ms after r-101 completed).
Hypothesised that the long_url input was not sanitized for newlines before printing to the structured log stream.
